## Custom Resource Definition Properties

### Spec
#### Schema
```yaml
admissionPolicy: string
bucketRef:
  external: string
  name: string
  namespace: string
desiredState: string
resourceID: string
ttl: string
zone: string
```

<table class="properties responsive">
<thead>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2">Fields</th>
    </tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>admissionPolicy</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Cache admission policy. Valid values include: `admit-on-first-miss` and `admit-on-second-miss`. Defaults to `admit-on-first-miss`.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>bucketRef</code></p>
            <p><i>Required</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">object</code></p>
            <p>Immutable. The reference to bucket where cache needs to be created.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>bucketRef.external</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>A reference to an externally managed StorageBucket resource. Should be in the format "projects/{{projectID}}/buckets/{{bucketID}}".</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>bucketRef.name</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The name of a StorageBucket resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>bucketRef.namespace</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The namespace of a StorageBucket resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>desiredState</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The desired state of the cache. Possible values include "running", "disabled", and "paused". If not specified, the default value is "running". This field controls the runtime behavior of the cache. Please note that changes to the `desiredState` are prioritized over any other updates. For instance, if both the `desiredState` and `ttl` are updated simultaneously, the state would be updated first, followed by `ttl`.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>resourceID</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>The AnywhereCacheID generated via backend. It can be used by users to manage an existing cache.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>ttl</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Cache entry TTL (ranges between 1h to 7d). This is a cache-level config that defines how long a cache entry can live. Defaults to "86400s". TTL must be in whole seconds.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>zone</code></p>
            <p><i>Required</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Immutable. The zone in which the cache instance needs to be created. For example, us-central1-a.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Sample YAML(s)

### Typical Use Case
```yaml
apiVersion: storage.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageAnywhereCache
metadata:
  name: storageanywherecache-sample
  annotations:
    cnrm.cloud.google.com/reconcile-interval-in-seconds: "20"
spec:
  bucketRef:
    name: ${PROJECT_ID?}-storageanywherecache-dep
  zone: us-central1-a
  admissionPolicy: admit-on-second-miss
  desiredState: running
  ttl: 56400s
---
apiVersion: storage.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: StorageBucket
metadata:
  # StorageBucket names must be globally unique. Replace ${PROJECT_ID?} with your project ID.
  name: ${PROJECT_ID?}-storageanywherecache-dep
```

Note: If you have any trouble with instantiating the resource, refer to <a href="/config-connector/docs/troubleshooting">Troubleshoot Config Connector</a>.
